top_signals.title: Partners Group hit by surge in withdrawal requests at second major fund
top_signals.summary: Increase raises possibility that exits from $16bn US fund could be blocked
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gold prices glitter amid geopolitical uncertainty
top_signals.summary: Gold saw a significant price rally over the course of 2025, after geopolitical uncertainty and heightened central bank buying drove more people to the safe haven asset. Gold prices rallied 44 per cent last year, reaching $4,550 per ounce in December and recording 56 fresh record highs according to the latest report from Metals Focus. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: About 67% of banned Anthropic accounts used AI to prep for cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: AI firm Anthropic mapped a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats, finding that malicious actors are quickly becoming more dangerous with AI.
